languages.original_text: "The simple logic of primitive predation. The more dangerous the rival, the stronger the imperative to eliminate it. I had time to carefully study the Haemonculus Tervantias, and he exhibited precisely the same behaviour."

languages.text: "Простая логика примитивного хищнического подхода. Чем опаснее конкурент, тем сильнее необходимость его устранения. Я успел тщательно изучить гемункула Тервантьяса, и он демонстрировал ровно те же повадки".

"The simple logic of primitive predation. The more dangerous the rival, the stronger the imperative to eliminate it. I had time to carefully study the Haemonculus Tervantias, and he exhibited precisely the same behaviour."
languages.original_text: "Простая логика примитивного хищнического подхода. Чем опаснее конкурент, тем сильнее необходимость его устранения. Я успел тщательно изучить гемункула Тервантьяса, и он демонстрировал ровно те же повадки".

traits.locale_text: "The simple logic of primitive predation. The more dangerous the rival, the stronger the imperative to eliminate it. I had time to carefully study the Haemonculus Tervantias, and he exhibited precisely the same behaviour."

"The simple logic of primitive predation. The more dangerous the rival, the stronger the imperative to eliminate it. I had time to carefully study the Haemonculus Tervantias, and he exhibited precisely the same behaviour."

"The simple logic of primitive predation. The more dangerous the rival, the stronger the imperative to eliminate it. I had time to carefully study the Haemonculus Tervantias, and he exhibited precisely the same behaviour."

languages.text: «La lógica simple de los depredadores primitivos. Cuanto más peligroso es el rival, más fuerte es el imperativo de eliminarlo. Tuve tiempo para estudiar en detalle al Hemónculo Tervantias, que exhibía exactamente el mismo comportamiento».
languages.original_text: "The simple logic of primitive predation. The more dangerous the rival, the stronger the imperative to eliminate it. I had time to carefully study the Haemonculus Tervantias, and he exhibited precisely the same behaviour."

traits.locale_text: «La lógica simple de los depredadores primitivos. Cuanto más peligroso es el rival, más fuerte es el imperativo de eliminarlo. Tuve tiempo para estudiar en detalle al Hemónculo Tervantias, que exhibía exactamente el mismo comportamiento».

languages.text: 「原始的な捕食の単純な論理です。競争相手が危険であればあるほど、それを排除すべき衝動も強くなる。私はハエモンクルス・テルヴァンティアスをじっくり観察する時間がありましたが、彼もまさに同じ行動を示していました」
languages.original_text: "The simple logic of primitive predation. The more dangerous the rival, the stronger the imperative to eliminate it. I had time to carefully study the Haemonculus Tervantias, and he exhibited precisely the same behaviour."

traits.locale_text: 「原始的な捕食の単純な論理です。競争相手が危険であればあるほど、それを排除すべき衝動も強くなる。私はハエモンクルス・テルヴァンティアスをじっくり観察する時間がありましたが、彼もまさに同じ行動を示していました」

languages.text: “这是原始的捕食逻辑。猎物越危险，猎手消灭它的意愿就越强。我曾仔细研究过血伶人特万提亚斯，而他表现出的正是这一行为倾向。”
languages.original_text: "The simple logic of primitive predation. The more dangerous the rival, the stronger the imperative to eliminate it. I had time to carefully study the Haemonculus Tervantias, and he exhibited precisely the same behaviour."

traits.locale_text: “这是原始的捕食逻辑。猎物越危险，猎手消灭它的意愿就越强。我曾仔细研究过血伶人特万提亚斯，而他表现出的正是这一行为倾向。”

languages.text: "Die einfache Logik primitiver Prädation. Je gefährlicher der Rivale, desto stärker der Drang, ihn zu eliminieren. Ich hatte Zeit, den Haemonculus Tervantias eingehend zu studieren, und er hat exakt dasselbe Verhalten an den Tag gelegt."
languages.original_text: "The simple logic of primitive predation. The more dangerous the rival, the stronger the imperative to eliminate it. I had time to carefully study the Haemonculus Tervantias, and he exhibited precisely the same behaviour."

traits.locale_text: "Die einfache Logik primitiver Prädation. Je gefährlicher der Rivale, desto stärker der Drang, ihn zu eliminieren. Ich hatte Zeit, den Haemonculus Tervantias eingehend zu studieren, und er hat exakt dasselbe Verhalten an den Tag gelegt."

languages.text: « C'est la logique simple de la prédation primitive. Plus un rival est dangereux, plus grand est l'impératif de l'éliminer. J'ai eu tout le temps d'étudier l'hémoncule Tervantias, et c'était précisément ainsi qu'il se comportait. »
languages.original_text: "The simple logic of primitive predation. The more dangerous the rival, the stronger the imperative to eliminate it. I had time to carefully study the Haemonculus Tervantias, and he exhibited precisely the same behaviour."

traits.locale_text: « C'est la logique simple de la prédation primitive. Plus un rival est dangereux, plus grand est l'impératif de l'éliminer. J'ai eu tout le temps d'étudier l'hémoncule Tervantias, et c'était précisément ainsi qu'il se comportait. »

languages.text: "İlkel yırtıcılığın basit mantığı. Rakip ne kadar tehlikeliyse onu ortadan kaldırma zorunluluğu da o kadar güçlüdür. Haimonkulus Tervantias'ı dikkatlice inceleme fırsatım oldu ve o da tam olarak aynı davranışı sergiliyordu."
languages.original_text: "The simple logic of primitive predation. The more dangerous the rival, the stronger the imperative to eliminate it. I had time to carefully study the Haemonculus Tervantias, and he exhibited precisely the same behaviour."

traits.locale_text: "İlkel yırtıcılığın basit mantığı. Rakip ne kadar tehlikeliyse onu ortadan kaldırma zorunluluğu da o kadar güçlüdür. Haimonkulus Tervantias'ı dikkatlice inceleme fırsatım oldu ve o da tam olarak aynı davranışı sergiliyordu."
